text:
an employer identification number (EIN) or social security number (SSN). 
SHORT NAME: TAX_NUM 
LONG NAME: TAX_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
For DME claims, all 10 digits are populated. The first 9 digits represent the EIN or SSN, and the final 
(rightmost) tenth digit indicates the type of provider ID that is used (reference the 
DMERC_LINE_SUPPLR_TYPE_CD for these values). For all other claim types, only 9 digits of the field 
are populated.
